title: Hunter Biden's felony conviction could complicate his plans to vote
shortDescription: The historic federal felony conviction of Hunter Biden could mean that his father's close race could lose one more vote.

title: House Republicans vote to hold Attorney General in contempt | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Southern Baptists condemn the use of IVF. Plus, the Oklahoma Supreme Court dismisses a lawsuit from survivors of the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre.

title: Will the Senate vote to protect IVF? Republicans, Democrats split.
shortDescription: The Senate will vote Thursday on a push to protect access to in vitro fertilization, though it's expected to fail in the face of nearly unanimous opposition from the chamber’s Republicans.

title: Donald Trump meets with GOP members of congress
shortDescription: Former President and Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump met with congressional Republicans in Washington, DC, on June 13, 2024.

title: 'Trump too small'. Supreme Court says Trump insult can't be trademarked
shortDescription: A lewd insult directed at Donald Trump tested a federal law against trademarks. At issue: can names of living individuals be used without consent?

title: Will Biden keep tagging Trump a 'convicted felon' after son's conviction?
shortDescription: A source close to the Biden campaign said it won't shy away from calling Trump a "convicted felon" even after Hunter Biden's conviction.

title: Donald Trump talks 2025 GOP priorities with House, Senate Republicans
shortDescription: It will be Donald Trump's return to Capitol Hill since leaving office almost four years ago.

title: Trump-backed Maine candidate to face Rep. Jared Golden for U.S. House
shortDescription: Rep. Jared Golden, a Democrat, will face Donald Trump-backed state Rep. Austin Theriault, R-Fort Kent, a former NASCAR driver.

title: North Dakota primaries 2024: Governor, Congressional race wins
shortDescription: A snapshot of North Dakota's primary winners and who is heading to the general election in November.

title: House votes Garland in contempt of Congress
shortDescription: The House voted 216 to 207 to hold Attorney General Merrick Garland in contempt of Congress over recordings of President Biden.

title: Nude man seen in hotel surveillance video isn't Hunter Biden | Fact check
shortDescription: The back tattoo of the man in the viral video does not match Hunter Biden's. The video was first shared by Chinese social media users in May.

title: Lawsuit aims to block Biden border policy
shortDescription: The suit says President Biden's executive order violates immigration laws by effectively barring migrants' access to the asylum system.

title: US intel officials brief on their foreign election influence concerns
shortDescription: Worried about a repeat of Russia's 2016 interference in the 2024 election election, spy agencies come together in the Foreign Malign Influence Center.

title: NJ reviewing Trump golf liquor licenses post-conviction
shortDescription: The New Jersey Attorney General is reviewing the impact of Donald Trump's guilty verdict on liquor licenses for Trump Golf courses in the state.

title: Democrats to introduce legislation to rein in 'rogue' Supreme Court
shortDescription: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said she and Jamie Raskin will introduce legislation to “rein in a fundamentally unaccountable and rogue” Supreme Court.

title: Donald Trump, Hunter Biden trials are over – the impact will linger
shortDescription: The convictions of Donald Trump and Hunter Biden are changing the 2024 presidential campaign in ways the campaigns are trying to assess.

title: North Dakota passed age limits for Congress. But is it legal?
shortDescription: How old is too old to run for Congress? Voters in North Dakota approved a ballot measure but is it enforceable?

title: This Biden ad attacking Trump isn't new. It's from 2019 | Fact check
shortDescription: The ad is real, but it isn't new. It debuted in 2019 as part of Biden's 2020 presidential campaign.

title: Army veteran Sam Brown wins Nevada's GOP Senate primary
shortDescription: The highly anticipated U.S. Senate race in Nevada is now set between Republican Sam Brown and Democratic incumbent, Sen. Jacky Rosen.

title: No, Trump did not 'blow off' post-sentencing report | Fact check
shortDescription: Donald Trump has taken part in a post-conviction interview with New York's probation department. He did not "blow off" any required reports.
